_comment: Microsoft Entra External ID — BankID identity provider federation (Sweden). BankID is the Swedish national digital identity (operated by Finansiell ID-Teknik BID AB, owned by major Swedish banks). Issues eIDAS LoA SUBSTANTIAL or HIGH depending on the credential. UDCSP federates against the BankID OIDC connector rather than embedding the autostart/QR launcher directly to keep the assurance chain inside External ID.
_pseudonymisationOnReceive: Hash se:gov:bankid:personnummer with the country-scoped pepper from Key Vault before persisting; never store the raw personnummer. The hash is what gets emitted as 'nationalIdHash' by the eidas-claims-extension.
_todo_case_study_scaffold: Real onboarding requires a BankID Relying Party agreement signed via Finansiell ID-Teknik BID AB and an mTLS client certificate issued to the SE-region UDCSP tenant.
Substitute bankid-rp-clientid, the Key Vault references, and the production endpoint (appapi2 = production; use https://appapi2.test.bankid.com for staging).
Verify which ACR / LoA mapping the latest BankID OIDC catalogue publishes — the spec evolves.
